name: com.cyclone-games.choreography
description: A reusable skill/ability choreography system for describing, playing, and scheduling presentation timelines (animation, audio, VFX, gameplay events, resource preload) with pluggable playback strategies and backend adapters. The engine-free Core runs in CLI tests and headless servers; the Unity interaction layer binds it to ScriptableObject authoring and MonoBehaviour lifecycles without requiring a specific asset-management backend.
